Tooltip_POS_PortableComputer:
A bulky early-90s portable computer.
With this in your inventory, connect to POSnet via any radio — no desktop terminal required.

Battery drains while the terminal is open.
Tooltip_POS_ReconPhotograph:
A photograph of a POSnet reconnaissance target.
Combine with paper and a pen to write field notes.
Tooltip_POS_FieldReport:
Handwritten field observations for a POSnet operation.
Return to a terminal to submit.
Tooltip_POS_RawMarketNote:
Handwritten observations on local market conditions.
Upload at a POSnet terminal to add to the intel database.
Tooltip_POS_CompiledMarketReport:
A compiled analysis of commodity prices and availability.
Generated from multiple field notes for a single commodity.
Tooltip_POS_ReconCamcorder:
A compact VHS-C camcorder from the early 1990s.
Equip in secondary hand to passively record nearby buildings and room types.
Requires a VHS-C tape inserted. Drains battery while active.
Tooltip_POS_FieldSurveyLogger:
A rugged handheld data logger for environmental survey work.
Equip to passively collect metadata about nearby buildings.
Can store data internally (10 entries) or on a VHS tape. Silent operation.
Tooltip_POS_DataCalculator:
A scientific calculator from the early 1990s.
Right-click with raw data items to compile higher-quality market reports.
Carrying this provides a small confidence bonus to all recon data.
Tooltip_POS_BlankVHSCTape:
A factory-fresh VHS-C compact cassette tape.
Insert into a recon device to record up to 20 reconnaissance entries.
Review recorded tapes at a TV to extract market intelligence.
Tooltip_POS_RecordedReconTape:
A VHS-C tape containing recorded reconnaissance footage.
Review at a TV with pen and paper to extract market notes.
Upload the resulting notes to a POSnet terminal.
Tooltip_POS_WornVHSTape:
A heavily used VHS-C tape that has degraded beyond reliable recording.
Can be recycled for magnetic tape scrap.
Tooltip_POS_DamagedVHSTape:
A broken VHS-C cassette tape.
Can be repaired with a screwdriver and adhesive tape, or recycled for scrap.
Tooltip_POS_MagneticTapeScrap:
Loose magnetic tape ribbon salvaged from VHS cassettes.
Used to craft improvised recon tapes.
Tooltip_POS_RefurbishedVHSCTape:
A repaired VHS-C tape with visible adhesive patches.
Lower quality than factory tapes (15 entries, reduced confidence).
Tooltip_POS_SplicedReconTape:
A makeshift VHS-C tape spliced from multiple damaged tapes.
Functional but unreliable (8 entries, low confidence, may corrupt data).
Tooltip_POS_ImprovisedReconTape:
A crude improvised cassette assembled from scavenged materials.
Extremely unreliable (4 entries, very low confidence, signal corruption likely).
